title: Is Autoship the Secret Behind Chewy's Customer Retention Success?
text: Chewy's Autoship subscription program is a cornerstone of the business model, reinforcing its role as a key driver of customer loyalty and growth. Autoship allows customers to schedule regular deliveries of pet supplies, ensuring they never run out of essential items, with subscribers receiving discounts and special offers, adding value and encouraging long-term use. Sales to customers who have participated in the Autoship program amounted to $9.4 billion out of $11.9 billion of revenue in fiscal 2024, or 79.2% of the company's top line. Autoship provides predictable revenue, allowing operational planning to reduce cost and grow margin, providing Chewy unique structural competitive advantages. The program drives predictable demand, reduces churn, and lowers acquisition costs. By deepening customer relationships and delivering recurring, predictable revenues, Autoship has become a critical growth engine. As online retail subscriptions gain share from physical stores, Chewy is leveraging its Autoship auto-fill program to win customers from traditional competitors. Autoship subscription, paid membership program Chewy+, and vet care offerings are creating a symbiotic ecosystem, driving new customer acquisition and increased retention.
